series_metadata.series_title: Infectious Waste Alternative Treatment Technology Evaluation Forms and Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Anyone who seeks approval by the Director for an alternative infectious waste treatment technology must submit an alternative treatment evaluation form and supporting material for review by Ohio EPA. These reviews prompt correspondence letters from Ohio EPA that either seek clarification, request additional information, or authorize or deny the request.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: approved and unapproved alternative infectious waste treatment technology evaluation forms onsite during active review process by Ohio EPA
